users.title: All Members
users.description: View and manage all users in the system
users.addUserDetails: Fill in the details to add a new user.
users.noUsersFiltered: No users match your current filters. Try adjusting your search criteria.
users.noUsersEmpty: Get started by adding your first user to the system.

report.title: Contribution Report
report.description: View user contributions within the selected date range

hints.tasksCompleted: Number of tasks this user annotated in the selected date range.
hints.tasksAnnotated: Number of tasks this user annotated in the selected date range.
hints.tasksReviewed: Number of tasks that reached reviewed status for this user’s work.
hints.tasksReviewedAsR1: Tasks reviewed in the Reviewer A (order 1) slot.
hints.tasksFinalReviewed: Tasks that reached final review for this user’s work.
hints.tasksFinalised: Number of tasks this user finalised in the selected date range.
hints.rejectionCountAnnotator: Total rejection events on this user’s annotation slots.
hints.rejectionCountReviewer: Final-reviewer rejections received on this user’s review slots.
hints.rejectionCountTask: Times this person’s slot was rejected. Annotator: forced to 0 if task not reviewed. Reviewer: forced to 0 if task not finalised.
hints.rejectedPercentAnnotator: Share of rejection events (event-based): rejected_count ÷ (rejected_count + tasks_reviewed). Does not add to 100% with Unrejected %.
hints.rejectedPercentReviewer: Share of rejection events received: rejected_count ÷ (rejected_count + tasks_reviewed).
hints.unrejectedPercentAnnotator: Share of reviewed tasks with no rejection (task-based). Uses a different base than Rejected %, so they do not add to 100%.
hints.unrejectedPercentReviewer: Share of final-reviewed tasks with no rejection received on this user’s review slots.
hints.unrejectedPercentFinalReviewer: Share of finalised tasks where both review-slot rejection counts are 0.
hints.rejectionsMade: Annotation rejections this reviewer made as R1 (annotation A + B rejection counts). Null / N/A for R2 and non-reviewed tasks.
hints.rejectionsMadeSummaryReviewer: Total annotation rejections made as Reviewer A (R1).
hints.rejectionsMadePercentReviewer: Share of R1 rejection events made: rejections_made_count ÷ (rejections_made_count + tasks_reviewed_as_r1).
hints.rejectionsMadeSummaryFinalReviewer: Review-slot rejections made by the final reviewer (review A + review B counts on finalised tasks).
hints.rejectionsMadePercentFinalReviewer: Share of rejection events made: rejections_made_count ÷ (rejections_made_count + tasks_finalised).
hints.finalCharCount: Length of the final approved text (F). Null if F is absent or whitespace-only after normalization.
hints.finalCharCountSummary: Sum of final approved text lengths (F) across counted tasks.
hints.charDiff: Character (Levenshtein) distance vs final approved text F. Null if F is absent.
hints.charDiffSummary: Sum of character distances vs final approved text across counted tasks.
hints.charPercentDiff: Percentage difference from the final text: 100 × total_char_difference ÷ max(len(compared text), len(F)), rounded to 2 dp.
hints.charPercentDiffSummary: Overall text distance vs finals: sum(total_char_difference) ÷ sum(final_char_count).
hints.reviewCharCount: Length of this row’s review text (Ri). Null when Ri is empty or F is absent.
hints.reviewCharCountSummary: Total length of review texts across counted tasks.
hints.reviewCharDiff: Distance from this review to the closest annotation: min(Lev(A1, Ri), Lev(A2, Ri)). Null when Ri is empty or F is absent.
hints.reviewCharDiffSummary: Sum of distances from each review to the closest annotation.
hints.ownVersion: Dropdown spots where the contributor wrote their own version (uses / characters in s3).
hints.selectedOption: Dropdown spots where an existing option (s1 or s2) was selected (uses / characters).
hints.modifiedOption: Dropdown spots where a selected option was then modified (uses / characters).
hints.slot: Contribution slot: 1 (A) or 2 (B). Null for final reviewer.

report.noContributionsHint: Try selecting a different date range

userContributions.title: Group Contributions
userContributions.description: View annotator, reviewer, and final reviewer contribution totals for your group.
userContributions.noGroupYet: You don't belong to any group yet.
userContributions.groupsLoadError: Could not load groups. Please try again.
userContributions.featureNotImplementedForGroup: This feature is not implemented for your group yet.
userContributions.invalidDateRange: Invalid dates. Use YYYY-MM-DD. Start must be on or before end (both days inclusive).
userContributions.dateFilterTitleGroup: Date range. Apply to load contribution totals for this group.
userContributions.validationDatesRequired: Enter both start and end dates.
userContributions.validationStartBeforeEnd: Start date must be on or before end date (both inclusive).
userContributions.adminExpandHint: Expand a group to load contribution totals for the current month. Change the date range and apply to refresh. Each group keeps its own filter.
userContributions.noAnnotators: No annotator data for this period.
userContributions.noReviewers: No reviewer data for this period.
userContributions.noFinalReviewers: No final reviewer data for this period.
